page: Microsoft Azure F1alds_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Faldsv7 server family. It is configured with 1 dedicated vCPU powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 2.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type includes 118 GB of local storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. It does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses. There are no graphics processing units (GPUs) bundled with this configuration.

Designed as a low-memory, compute-oriented option within its class, the F1alds_v7 offers a resource-dense profile for workloads requiring dedicated CPU execution with minimal memory overhead. It is suitable for lightweight utility computing, basic web serving, small-scale background tasks, and development or testing environments that do not demand high memory capacity or parallel processing.
description: Microsoft Azure F1alds_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Faldsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features a single dedicated vCPU powered by an AMD processor, paired with 2.0 GB of system memory. This low-memory configuration includes 118 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it does not feature any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The server is designed for resource-constrained, compute-focused tasks where a dedicated CPU is required but memory demands are minimal. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource sharing, making it a reliable choice for predictable, low-intensity workloads. This hardware profile is best suited for lightweight background processes, basic web serving, simple utility tasks, and software development or testing environments that operate within a small memory footprint.
og_description: Microsoft Azure F1alds_v7 is an x86_64 virtual machine featuring 1 dedicated AMD vCPU, 2.0 GB of memory, and 118 GB of local storage, designed for low-memory, compute-focused workloads.

tagline: A single-core, low-memory virtual machine with dedicated AMD compute and local storage for lightweight utility workloads.
